Motion To Mediate In Lieu Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Mar-08-2004 Set For Trial On Aug-23-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-03-04 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 001
MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. 420098 Farmers Insurance Group vs. Golden State Produce.
Defendant Golden State Produce, Elpidio Barajas' Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Arbitration. A Jury Trial Date of 8/23/2004 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206 is ordered set. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. A Mediation enforcement OSC is ordered set on 5/26/2004 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patty Lee Hubble, CSR#3058. (212)
